title: Noah Kahan Becomes a Star and It Messes with His Head
summary: Noah Kahan is a singer from Vermont who became famous very quickly. He writes songs about feeling lonely and not fitting in. Many people love his music, especially on TikTok. He even got a big boost when singer Olivia Rodrigo sang one of his songs. But being famous is hard for Noah. He feels scared that his success might go away. He also jokes a lot, even about silly things like bathroom humor. His fans like his funny posts. Even though he is a big star now, he still feels nervous and unsure. This article tells us that becoming famous can be exciting but also scary.

background_read: Noah Kahan is a singer who started making music a few years ago. He writes songs about his feelings and life in a small town. Many young people like his music because it sounds honest. He became very famous very fast, which can be both good and bad.
